headline: What Block (SQ)'s New AI Commerce Tools and Partnerships Mean For Shareholders
summary: In late April 2026, Bank of America Securities began covering Block, highlighting AI-driven efficiency efforts alongside new products such as Square’s Managerbot and expanded partnerships with merchants and platforms like Uber Eats and Black Seed Bagels. These developments underline how Block is using artificial intelligence and integrated commerce tools to deepen its role in both consumer payments and complex multi-location business operations.
